reviews.review_msg: First, the lectures are very interactive. Makes you feel like you're in a book-club. Loved the texts chosen for this course and even ENG114. Tough grader but makes you stay motivated all through the lectures. Very helpful and knowledgeable. Highly recommend for any literature courses.
It was really a pleasure to take his class. He will give detailed feedback to each person in a sincere and friendly manner.

He is a great person, he's passionate and friendly, his class is easy if you are open-minded enough. Essay grading could be confusing, I understand what he wants to see in the essay but I need time practicing my writing. Still wonder why he looks familiar, maybe Robert Downey Jr has a side job when he doesn't grow his beard (jk).

Teddy is one of the 7 wonders of the world. His teaching and passion are amazing and he is quite the down to earth person. Be invested in the class and you will enjoy it. I can't say enough good things about him just take the class and enjoy the ride of teaching and enlightenment. Fantastic professor and probably my favourite instructor of all-time

Dr. Wisniwski is easily the BEST English professor I have ever had. His passion for literature is incredibly contagious. He picked the most AMAZING stories and made them so relevant to our lives. He went above and beyond his call of duty to make sure assignments were clear (even writing us a sample essay!) This class was so worthwhile and helpful.
Although he has interesting things to say and the readings were fun. He is not clear on assignments and wants to see his own opinion repeated in the stidents works.

very interesting person with lots to share. Passionate about the topics and books. Doesn't really show that he cares about the students but he is actually really willing to help. Lectures are structured interesting and interactively. His lectures are 10/10. However, can be a tough marker.

Teds class was a very nice break from the chaos that was my last semester. His lectures are unique (at least in FIC), and listening to him is pure pleasure. Every week he hands out questions which can help you prepare for the exams and goes through them in detail. My advice is to actively participate, and you should be fine. Thank you, Ted!
One of the íntructors that I really admire so far. Very passionate about teaching, very inspirational lectures. Work hard and youll get the mark you deserve. Highly recommended!

He's super intense and passionate. One of my absolute favorite professors ever. If you put decent effort into reading the material and doing the work, it's not hard to get top marks. However, it is much more difficult to do well in exam settings or final project. Overall though, he's awesome. 10/10 would recommend.

super nice prof, very clear about what he wants from your essays. Interesting lectures, I took a night class with him and dont feel sleepy at all. A very inspiring prof. He just makes you fall in love with English

It's a shame we're only allowed so many characters on here as Ted is an exceptional instructor that far surpassed my expectations. The course itself was not a breeze (5 essays?) but if you're looking to improve your writing skills, definitely take this class.   Great guy and if you're willing to put in the work; he'll definitely recognize it.
Great prof and an even better person. Tough marker but he is very specific about what he wants from you. So follow what he says, participate in class and you'll do fine.

His essay critiques are very detailed, but I submitted 2 drafts and i kept getting contradictory replies, saying to do this, and then later saying that it wasn't clear enough.  Super confusing at times what he really wants.  I felt like I couldn't really think for myself, or I could, but only material that he had already thought of.  Frustrating.

Best prof I've had. Great guy and an even better teacher.  He is willing to spend time and make you improve on whatever that you may need to improve on. Work hard and you are guaranteed to do well in this class.
Great prof! Best prof I've had in three years.
AWESOME! Grades might be strict though.
Excellent guy!

I didnt read any of the books unless they were on sparknotes, did the weekly discussions the night before, started paper#1 night before, finished paper#2 on due date, studied for the exam night before and received a B over all. This class is definitely a GPA booster if you actually try! I hate English but he made it tolerable! Take him if you can!
Solid Prof. Would take another class with him. Teaches content very well and welcomes debate and discussion. Encourages creativity

Such a great prof. Always willing to help if you need it and gets really into the material. Made me want to take more English classes. Somewhat hard marker, but it makes you power forward (in a good way). Would definitely take again.

He is a really amazing professor. Incredibly passionate and knowledgable about what he is teaching. Lectures very interesting and enjoyable. I would defiantly take another one of his classes and would recommend him to anyone!!

He's a cool guy and really wants to help, you can really see when he's passionate about something and his grading is really fair. You do have to put some effort into the class, but overall it was super interesting and enjoyable.

He is a very intense prof, and very intelligent when it comes to what he teaches. He is very willing to meet outside of class at the student's convenience. It can be difficult asking questions in class because he has difficulty interpreting questions correctly. He also loves the word "problematize," he used it way too many times...

Would definitely take another class from Ted. He's funny and always willing to meet to discuss ideas. Understanding of life outside school, but takes class seriously. He's very animated and loves to engage with students. Uses the books and articles a LOT. I highly recommend him.
Extremely willing to meet outside of class to discuss topics. Very thorough and helpful. VERY, VERY smart. I could sit through the entire four hours of class and not feel bored. I'm not joking.
HE IS REALLY PASSIONATE. HIS LECTURES ARE GOOD. HOWEVER, HE IS NOT GENEROUS WITH HIS MARKS. HE EVEN GIVES HIMSELF GRADE 'B' ON SAMPLE ESSAYS HE WRITE.
Awesome class. Awesome prof.

Amazing prof! I had little interest in english (just taking it because I needed to) but he made it so interesting! He was extremely passionate about the topics he was presenting. Essays were graded fairly and his comments were very insightful. Final was different, but explained well beforehand and was very fair. Would definitely recommend!
He is a great prof! Insightful and really nice.  You can't help but be interested about what he has to say.
